headline: Why This Fund Made a $30 Million Bet on Floor & Decor Amid a 30% Stock Drop
summary: Floor & Decor supplies hard surface flooring and installation products to professional installers and DIY customers across the U.S.

headline: Is Linde Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Though Linde has lagged behind the broader Nasdaq Composite over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain strongly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
